steps.name: plan
steps.input_summary: User needs to check remaining PTO balance and submit a time-off request for next Friday
steps.output_summary: Plan: call HR API to fetch PTO balance, then help user submit the request

steps.name: call_api
steps.output_summary: HTTP 503 Service Unavailable. HR API is temporarily down for maintenance.

steps.name: retry_reason
steps.input_summary: HR API returned 503. Decide whether to retry or use fallback.
steps.output_summary: 503 is transient. Will retry once after brief pause. If it fails again, suggest user check HR portal directly.

steps.name: call_api
steps.output_summary: HTTP 200 OK. Balance: 12 days remaining. Accrued: 1.5 days/month.

steps.name: reason
steps.input_summary: Format PTO balance info and draft time-off request guidance
steps.output_summary: Drafted reply: user has 12 days PTO remaining, provided steps to submit request for next Friday via HR portal

steps.name: verify
steps.input_summary: Check response accuracy against API data and HR submission procedure
steps.output_summary: PTO balance matches API response. Submission steps align with HR portal workflow.

result.label: pass
result.summary: Successfully recovered from transient API failure on retry and provided accurate PTO balance with submission instructions
